name: ingested_at
description: When this row was written to BigQuery

name: alert_id
description: Unique identifier for this alert from the source system

name: alert_type
description: Type of alert: red_flag, psps, evacuation_order, evacuation_warning

name: zip_codes_affected
description: List of ZIP codes within the alert boundary

name: active
description: Whether the alert is currently active

name: issued_at
description: When the alert was originally issued

name: expires_at
description: When the alert is scheduled to expire
